reviews.review_description: The controllers were wonky, I finished the tutorial, but then couldn't get out of it.  I love Temple Run, and cats, so thought this would be a cute little diversion. But at least for me it's broken. If someone wants to clue me in to what buttons to push to get out of the tutorial, I'd be more than happy to update my review, once I can play it.

This is just a simple endless running game. It's fun to waste a bit of time on but not much to it. You get 1 level w/ 1 character at the start and can unlock a night mode (however daytime textures randomly pop in in night mode) another character and several costumes. 

The shop menu gets blocked if you try to access it after running forcing you to exit the game and reenter to see it and I wish you could enter your name in the scoreboard instead of it just having the characters name but this is fun for a bit
